reviews.comment:
Te atienden de primera tanto en la estación  como en la full ypf. Los baños muy limpios
Aceptan todos los medios de pago

(Translated by Google)
They provide first-class service both at the station and at the Full YPF. The bathrooms are very clean.
They accept all payment methods.

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, copada la atencion, la higiene de los baños 10/10 GOD, las hamburguesas muy buenas, tiene aire acondicionado,una hermosa vista, muy buenos asientos y mesas, buen servicio 20/10 GOD
Recomendado

(Translated by Google)
Very good, great service, bathroom cleanliness 10/10 GOD, the burgers are very good, it has air conditioning, a beautiful view, very good seats and tables, good service 20/10 GOD
Recommended

reviews.comment:
Como todas las del ACA.  Parece que se pusieran de acuerdo... Deben estar permanentemente achicando costos, porque  la atencion es pésima

(Translated by Google)
Like all the ACA dealerships. It seems like they're all in cahoots... They must be constantly cutting costs, because the service is terrible.
